Devs don't understand that 10x more people (including me) would subscribe monthly for 2.99. Instead they only get 1/10th the subscribers at $12.99 and lose about 60% of what they otherwise could be making. Devs also don't understand that force shuffle AND ads are too much. It drives people off the app so they get less ad revenue. If they change subscription cost to 2.99 their sub revenue doubles. If they allow no shuffle, then ad revenue also goes up substantially.
